Mark Lorenz Frame by Frame 2.0

Sa bawat kuha at galaw ng eksena,
Pangarap ko'y unti-unting nagiging totoo sa bawat kamera.

Welcome to Mark Lorenz: Frame by Frame 2.0 — a personal website that tells the story of my journey, growth, and dreams. Just like a film made of many scenes, my life is shaped by different experiences that help me become a better version of myself.

A 19-year-old BSIT student with a passion for filmmaking, multimedia creation, video editing, and storytelling.

My Film Projects
Tap to explore

Scroll

01

Me Holistically

A complete portrait of who I am — physically, spiritually, digitally, and emotionally. Every dimension of my self, explored with honesty.

Identity
02

Personal Development

From a BSIT student to a future IT professional and multimedia creator. Tracking the skills, growth, and vision that shape my career path.

Growth
03

Version 2.0

Goals reached, lessons learned, and the Version 2.0 plan in action. A roadmap of milestones — past, present, and everything still ahead.

Milestones
Behind The Lens

Me Behind the Camera

Crafting stories through light, motion, and emotion.

Beyond the Lens

The Code Behind
the Creativity

"Not everything I create is seen through a lens.
Some are built through logic and code."

I'm a first-year IT student who's still finding his footing in the world of programming. Right now, I know the basic fundamentals of C++ and a little bit of HTML — nothing complex yet, but enough to feel the spark of what's possible. Just like how every great film starts with a single frame, every great program starts with a single line. I'm learning, experimenting, and slowly building a bridge between my love for storytelling and the logic of technology. Creativity and code aren't that different — both begin with an idea, and both take patience to bring to life.
